name: Haverford College
meets_full_need_notes: Haverford meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Haverford eliminated loans from financial aid packages in 2020. All aid is grant-based with no institutional loans. Haverford's no-loan policy applies to all four years.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive same need-based aid as RD. Binding ED commitment can be released if financial aid is insufficient.
special_programs: Center for Career and Professional Advising funding
appeal_policy: Haverford accepts appeals for changed financial circumstances through the Financial Aid Office.
